strings.transfer_message: I'm connecting you with an Apple Support specialist who can help further. They'll have all the details of our conversation so you won't need to repeat anything.
strings.specialist_resolved: I'm glad the specialist was able to help! Is there anything else I can assist you with?
strings.followup_scheduled: A follow-up has been scheduled for your case. You'll be contacted by an Apple specialist at the time you arranged.
